mapper.select: select id, email, nickname, real_name as real_name, birth_date as birth_date, bio, profile_image as profile_image, role, status, creator_verified as creator_verified, seller_verified as seller_verified, creator_tier as creator_tier, follower_count as follower_count, following_count as following_count, gallery_count as gallery_count, phone_number as phone_number, last_login_datetime as last_login_datetime, created_datetime as created_datetime, updated_datetime as updated_datetime from tbl_member where id = #{id}
mapper.update: update tbl_member set status = #{status}, updated_datetime = now() where id = #{id}
